behaviors.description: The speech-to-text output preserves speaker labels so that the summary can attribute statements to specific attendees.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is model-output quality from a real speech-to-text/diarization model: mocked STT would hide label-loss and misattribution defects. Not Workflow: behavior targets one agentic judgment boundary (speaker labeling), not a required multi-agentic chain.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real meeting audio sample through the real STT API and assert speaker labels are preserved and correctly mapped through the handoff payload used by summarization.

behaviors.description: Transcript parsing extracts explicit task assignments (assignee + task text) into the summary input structure.
behaviors.justification: Behavior text is local parsing/structuring logic ('Transcript parsing extracts... into the summary input structure'). Real OS/network/model output is not required to trigger this failure; deterministic fixtures can expose parser misses.
behaviors.test_description: Feed parser functions transcript snippets with explicit assignments and assert normalized output contains correct assignee and task text fields.

behaviors.description: The live summary output contains at least one action item for every attendee who was assigned a task during the meeting.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real model decision quality in summary generation (coverage of assigned attendees). Mocked LLM responses can always satisfy the rule and hide real misses. Rejected Workflow: behavior does not explicitly require validating multiple agentic handoff stages; it can be validated from a fixed transcript + one real summarization call.
behaviors.test_description: Use transcripts with known per-attendee assignments, call the real summarization model, and assert each assigned attendee appears in at least one generated action item.

behaviors.description: Decision extraction logic routes identified decisions into the `decisions` section schema rather than generic narrative fields.
behaviors.justification: The phrase 'routes identified decisions' indicates post-identification mapping logic. This is a local transformation failure boundary; no real infra or model judgment is needed.
behaviors.test_description: Given already-identified decision objects, test the routing function maps them into `decisions` schema keys and not narrative buckets.

behaviors.description: Key decisions mentioned in the transcript appear in the live summary's `decisions` section, not buried in the narrative.
behaviors.justification: This checks model extraction/placement quality from transcript content into structured output. Deterministic stubs hide whether the real model surfaces decisions correctly.
behaviors.test_description: Provide transcripts with explicit decision statements, run real summarization, and assert those decisions are present in the generated `decisions` section rather than only narrative text.

behaviors.description: When the audio file is longer than 60 minutes, the service splits it into segments and processes them sequentially, merging the results into a single coherent summary.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires sequential multi-step processing and merge across segments; with real STT/summary model calls per segment, failures appear in cross-step handoff/accumulation. Single-step Agentic would miss sequencing/merge defects.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real >60-minute recording through production segmentation settings, verify segment-by-segment processing order, and validate merged final summary maintains cross-segment continuity and required structured sections.

behaviors.description: The full pipeline (upload audio, transcribe, summarize, deliver structured output) completes without manual intervention for a real meeting recording.
behaviors.justification: This is explicitly end-to-end with multiple agentic stages (transcription + summarization) plus orchestration across the pipeline. Lower levels cannot catch multi-stage operational and handoff failures together.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the production-like pipeline on a real meeting recording from upload through delivery and assert successful completion plus valid structured output contract without manual fixes.
